name: odessa
desc: A broad-shouldered guildmother in her fifties: mistress of the river-barge guild of Dellhollow. A weathered, handsome, strong-boned face with iron dignity — calm level gaze, faint lines of wind and years. Grey-streaked dark hair coiled into a thick rope-like braid pinned up around her head. She wears a long dark oilskin coat with the collar open over a cream cable-knit gansey sweater, heavy leather work gloves folded and tucked under her wide belt at the hip (not worn), and a small brass whistle hanging on a cord around her neck. Composed, commanding, quietly kind.
sheetHint: same weathered handsome face, grey-streaked rope-coil braid pinned up, long dark oilskin coat over cream cable-knit gansey sweater, gloves tucked at belt, brass whistle on cord, dark trousers, sturdy boots

expressions.grave: grave — mouth a firm level line, jaw set, steady serious eyes carrying heavy responsibility, brows very slightly drawn
expressions.warm: a rare small smile — the corners of her mouth just lifting, eyes warming and softening, iron dignity melting a little
